params.name: Bimaran Casket
params.description:
On Oct 26, 119 AD, the Bimaran Casket was crafted.
The Bimaran casket is a small gold reliquary for Buddhist relics. Its main body is made of gold, inlaid with precious gemstones such as garnets, and carved with two groups of figures separated by arches, with the Buddha standing in the center, Brahma and Sakra standing on either side, acting as left and right protectors. It is not only a beautifully crafted artifact but also one of the important records of the image of the early Buddha, which …
